nasb.text: Moreover, the Lord said, “Because the daughters of Zion are proud And walk with heads held high and seductive eyes, And go along with mincing steps And tinkle the bangles on their feet,

esv.text: The Lord said: Because the daughters of Zion are haughty and walk with outstretched necks, glancing wantonly with their eyes, mincing along as they go, tinkling with their feet,

cnv.text: 耶和華又說： “因為錫安的女子高傲， 走路挺直頸項，媚眼看人， 俏步徐行， 用腳發出叮噹聲。

ccb.text: 耶和华又说： “锡安的女子狂傲， 昂首走路，卖弄媚眼， 俏步徐行，脚镯叮当。

csbs.text: 耶和华又说： “因为锡安女子自高、 行走挺项、卖弄媚眼、 俏步徐行、脚下叮当，
